description: Photorealistic miniature/tiny people in real scenes (dev, high quality)

model._hint: Transformer: city96/FLUX.1-dev-gguf (flux1-dev-Q8_0.gguf, ~12 GB). Pipeline components: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev (gated — HF token required). LoRA: iliketoasters/miniature-people (Miniature People - v1-0.safetensors). Q8_0 keeps near-bfloat16 quality with trivial dequantisation overhead on MPS. sequential_cpu_offload disabled (incompatible with GGUF). LoRA applied via set_adapters() (unfused — required for GGUF).

lora._hint: 0.9 default. Range: 0.7–1.0. Dev's stronger guidance may amplify LoRA effects — try 0.8 if results feel over-stylised.

generation._hint: 20 steps recommended. Range: 10–40. Dev with CFG (3.5) — more steps improve photorealistic texture and scale detail compared to schnell. Landscape (1024×768) works well for wide scene shots.

system._hint: ~12 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (incompatible with GGUF)

notes.about: Generates photorealistic images of miniature-scale people placed in real-world scenes — tiny figures next to everyday objects like keyboards, coins, or cups. Uses FLUX.1-dev for higher detail and photorealism than the schnell variant.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORDS: use one per prompt — 'miniature man', 'miniature woman', 'miniature people'. Describe scenes that imply scale using real-world reference objects (keyboard, coin, truck tire, matchbox). Closeups do not work well in v1. If clothing is not described, plaid patterns may appear. Examples: 'miniature man standing next to a coffee cup, photorealistic', 'miniature woman on top of a coin, macro photography', 'miniature people on a keyboard key, studio lighting'.
notes.warnings: FLUX.1-dev is a gated model — a HuggingFace token with access to black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev is required.
